name: Classic Fettuccine Alfredo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package directions until al dente.
2. Drain the pasta in a colander; return it to the pot.
3. Add Carnation 2% milk, Parmesan cheese, garlic powder, and dried basil to the pot with the pasta.
4. Stir constantly over medium-high heat until the sauce thickens and bubbles.
5. Season with black pepper to taste.
6. Serve immediately, topped with additional grated Parmesan if desired.
VARIATIONS:
Fettuccine Alfredo with Salmon: When the sauce thickens, stir in 1/3 cup thinly sliced smoked salmon or canned salmon, cut into strips or chunks.
Fettuccine Alfredo with Ham and Peas: When adding Parmesan cheese, stir in 1 cup slivered cooked ham and thawed frozen peas.
